title: Senior Backend Engineer, Fraud Platform

section_summary.label: company
section_summary.heading: About Acme Pay
content_preview: Acme Pay builds the financial infrastructure used by millions of businesses around the world. We are a mission-driven company with a fast-paced and inclusive culture.

section_summary.label: role_summary
section_summary.heading: The Role
content_preview: You will join the Fraud Platform team to build backend systems that detect account abuse, payment fraud, and trust signals in real time.

section_summary.label: responsibilities
section_summary.heading: What you'll do
content_preview: Build Python and Go services that power fraud detection and case management workflows.
Design APIs and event-driven pipelines using PostgreSQL, Kafka, and Redis.

section_summary.label: requirements
section_summary.heading: Qualifications
content_preview: 5+ years of backend software engineering experience in production systems.
Strong experience with Python, distributed systems, SQL, and cloud infrastructure.

section_summary.label: preferred
section_summary.heading: Nice to have
content_preview: Experience in fraud, risk, cybersecurity, or trust and safety domains.
Familiarity with feature platforms or machine learning inference systems.

role_summary: You will join the Fraud Platform team to build backend systems that detect account abuse, payment fraud, and trust signals in real time.
responsibilities: Design APIs and event-driven pipelines using PostgreSQL, Kafka, and Redis.
Build Python and Go services that power fraud detection and case management workflows.
Partner with data scientists and risk analysts to productionize rules, features, and real-time decisions.
Improve observability, reliability, and operational tooling for high-volume transaction systems.
Mentor engineers and drive technical design reviews across the platform.
requirements: Experience building services with PostgreSQL, Kafka, and REST APIs.
Strong experience with Python, distributed systems, SQL, and cloud infrastructure.
5+ years of backend software engineering experience in production systems.
Ability to work cross-functionally with product, analytics, and operations stakeholders.
preferred: Experience in fraud, risk, cybersecurity, or trust and safety domains.
Familiarity with feature platforms or machine learning inference systems.

embedding_text:
Title: Senior Backend Engineer, Fraud Platform

Domain: cybersecurity

Seniority: senior

Required skills: Python (computer programming), Go (computer programming), PostgreSQL, Kafka, Redis, SQL, distributed systems

Role summary:
- You will join the Fraud Platform team to build backend systems that detect account abuse, payment fraud, and trust signals in real time.

Core responsibilities:
- Design APIs and event-driven pipelines using PostgreSQL, Kafka, and Redis.
- Build Python and Go services that power fraud detection and case management workflows.
- Partner with data scientists and risk analysts to productionize rules, features, and real-time decisions.
- Improve observability, reliability, and operational tooling for high-volume transaction systems.
- Mentor engineers and drive technical design reviews across the platform.

Must-have evidence:
- Experience building services with PostgreSQL, Kafka, and REST APIs.
- Strong experience with Python, distributed systems, SQL, and cloud infrastructure.
- 5+ years of backend software engineering experience in production systems.
- Ability to work cross-functionally with product, analytics, and operations stakeholders.

Optional context:
- Experience in fraud, risk, cybersecurity, or trust and safety domains.
- Familiarity with feature platforms or machine learning inference systems.
